prediction.reasoning: The prediction for DE's price in 6 days is based on the Geometric Brownian Motion model. Historical adjusted closing prices for DE from 2019-01-01 to 2024-05-31 were used to calculate daily log returns. From these, an annualized drift (mu) of approximately 0.1873 and an annualized volatility (sigma) of approximately 0.2464 were estimated. The point estimate of $621.78 represents the median of the projected log-normal price distribution after 6 trading days. The confidence intervals were constructed using these estimated parameters and appropriate Z-scores for each confidence level, reflecting the expected price range with the given probability.
